panels.description: Wide shot: The protagonist sits at a desk in a dim room, head in hands, looking away from an open window that frames a calm but distant sea. Atmospheric lighting, heavy shadows on the face, Victorian era interior, melancholic mood.

bubbles.text: Oxen and wain-ropes would not bring me back again to that accursed island;

panels.description: Medium shot: The protagonist bolts upright in bed, eyes wide with terror, sweat on brow, messy bedsheets. Moonlight streaming in, creating sharp, jagged shadows across the room. The room feels claustrophobic.

bubbles.text: And the worst dreams that ever I have are when I hear the surf booming... or start upright with the voice of Captain Flint ringing in my ears.

panels.description: Close up: The protagonist's face, distorted by fear, mouth slightly open as if hearing the ghost of a voice. Background is pitch black, emphasizing the overwhelming sense of trauma. Sharp focus on eyes.
